hero.title: Full Stack JavaScript Engineer
hero.tagline: SaaS · Data Platforms · E-commerce · AI Integration
hero.description: I build performant, secure and scalable web applications — SaaS platforms with real-time data, e-commerce journeys used by millions, and AI-powered tooling that cuts reporting time in half.

about.seoDescription: Full Stack JavaScript Engineer specialised in SaaS platforms, e-commerce and data-driven applications. Based in Lille, available Paris & remote.
about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Building performant, scalable and secure applications since 2019.
about.bio1: I'm Ayoub Lafquih, a Full Stack JavaScript Engineer based between Lille and Paris. I've spent the last 6 years building production applications at Valiuz, Galeries Lafayette and Nordnet — from SaaS data platforms to e-commerce checkout flows used by millions.
about.bio2: My stack centres on the modern JavaScript ecosystem: Vue/Nuxt and Angular on the frontend, Node.js/NestJS on the backend, and Google Cloud for infrastructure. I'm particularly drawn to architecture decisions that age well — feature flags, RBAC, gRPC contracts, and CI/CD pipelines that teams actually trust.
about.bio3: Beyond the code, I care about developer experience, clean API design, and bridging the gap between engineering, product and data teams. I've led frontend teams, run code reviews, and helped junior developers grow — the people side of the work matters as much as the technical side.

availability.title: Available for opportunities
availability.subtitle: Open to full-time, freelance & remote positions

saas.title: SaaS Architecture
saas.description: Design and build multi-tenant SaaS platforms with feature flags, role-based access control, and scalable microservices. Currently at Valiuz building a data visualisation platform on GCP.

data.title: Data Visualization
data.description: Create real-time dashboards and data platforms using GCP (BigQuery, Pub/Sub, Firestore), Prometheus and Grafana — turning complex datasets into actionable insights.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Built the full user journey at Galeries Lafayette with SAP Spartacus & Angular — search, recommendations, listings, product pages — driving a measurable increase in conversion rate.

security.title: Security & Auth
security.description: Implement robust authentication and authorisation with Auth0, JWT, RBAC and OAuth 2.0. Built access management systems across distributed SaaS and e-commerce architectures.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.description: Integrated Gemini AI at Valiuz to auto-generate Retail Media performance reports, cutting analysis production time by 40%. Experienced with LLM APIs and prompt engineering.

leadership.title: Tech Leadership
leadership.description: Led frontend teams at Galeries Lafayette, defined technical standards, ran code reviews and pair programming sessions, and mentored developers in agile environments.

experience.seoDescription: Full Stack JS Engineer — 6 years across SaaS, e-commerce and data platforms at Valiuz, Galeries Lafayette and Nordnet.
experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: 6 years building production-grade applications at scale — SaaS, e-commerce and data platforms.

bullets: Designed and built a SaaS data visualisation platform with Nuxt 3 and GCP, making Retail Media insights accessible and readable for business teams across the group.
Developed NestJS microservices exposing gRPC and GraphQL APIs, with full documentation and unit/integration test suites.
Integrated Gemini AI to automatically generate Retail Media campaign performance reports, cutting analysis production time by 40%.
Implemented a feature flags system using Flagd, enabling safe and progressive rollouts without touching production configs.
Built an access management system with Auth0 and RBAC, controlling user permissions and data governance by business role.
Worked closely with data and product teams to ensure smooth integration and alignment between technical and business requirements.
Designed and built the full e-commerce user journey — search, recommendations, product listings and product pages — with SAP Spartacus and Angular.
Deployed Google Tag Manager for user tracking, improving data accuracy and enabling marketing teams to make better-informed decisions.
Led a team of developers: managed the roadmap, ran code reviews, pair programming and pair testing sessions.
Maintained comprehensive technical documentation on Jira and Confluence, ensuring full traceability and alignment between engineering and business.
Built several strategic web applications — Internet product sales, subsidy digitalisation — with Angular, RxJS, Nx, NgRx, SSR and Node.js.
Led the migration of a production AngularJS application to Angular 11, significantly improving performance and long-term maintainability.
Created a component library and design system with Storybook, reducing UI development time by 30% and establishing visual consistency across products.
Deployed an automated testing strategy with Cypress and Jest, cutting the regression rate in production.
Set up CI/CD pipelines on GitLab CI, reducing time-to-production and optimising the release cycle.

skills.seoDescription: Technical skills: Vue/Nuxt, Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, GraphQL, gRPC, Google Cloud, Auth0, Docker.
skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies I work with daily to build modern, scalable applications.

contact.openBody: Whether you're looking for a Full Stack engineer, a tech lead for your SaaS product, or a freelance contractor — I'd love to hear about your project.
contact.locationNote: Based between Lille and Paris — available for remote and on-site engagements across France & Europe.
